subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth and is worthy of the most inaccessible, most holy court of the Beloved One, Who hath bestowed His bounty upon the branches of His Sacred Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد ساحت امنع اقدس حضرت محبوبی را لایق و سزاست که افنان سدره اش را بموهبت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @personal instructions, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the power of words; of speech, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
